verses.1: The earth is the LORD’s, with its fullness;
verses.2: For he has founded it on the seas,
verses.3: Who may ascend to the LORD’s hill?
verses.4: He who has clean hands and a pure heart;
verses.5: He shall receive a blessing from the LORD,
verses.6: This is the generation of those who seek Him,
verses.7: Lift up your heads, you gates!
verses.8: Who is the King of glory?
verses.9: Lift up your heads, you gates;
verses.10: Who is this King of glory?
